emails.subject: Re: Swap Legal Documentation on Various Year End Deals
emails.subject_base: Swap Legal Documentation on Various Year End Deals
emails.body: What time on Monday would be convenient for both of you to meet with Brenda Funk? How about 9:30 a.m.? Please advise. Forwarded by Susan Flynn/HOU/ECT on 04/19/2000 01:10 PM Brenda L Funk 04/19/2000 01:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Swap Legal Documentation on Various Year End Deals
emails.subject_base: Swap Legal Documentation on Various Year End Deals
emails.body: Re: Swap Legal Documentation on Various Year End Deals Susan: I'm booked Monday morning but free Tuesday morning. Let's try for Tuesday. I currently only have a 4:30 meeting. Carol
